channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Human organoids reveal how to reverse âirreversibleâ nerve damage
item.description: Cambridge scientists created lab-grown brain and spinal cord systems that send signals and trigger muscle contractions, offering new insights.

item.title: DNA solves 250-year-old mystery of the Seychellesâ lost crocodiles
item.description: DNA analysis of historic museum specimens has resolved the mystery of the Seychelles' missing crocodiles, showing they were not a unique species.

item.title: Scottish wrens may be evolving into new species through island gigantism
item.description: Tiny birds on remote Scottish islands are undergoing a dramatic evolutionary transformation. Scientists studying four isolated populations of British ...

item.title: A 100-year-old piano mystery has finally been solved
item.description: For more than a century, pianists and music teachers have argued over whether a performerâs touch can actually change the tone color of a piano note â...
